title: MSI Z790 Gaming Motherboard #1
pcie_slots: 1 x PCIe 4.0 x16, 1 x PCIe 3.0 x16, 2 x PCIe 3.0 x1
usb_ports: 2 x USB 3.2 Gen 2, 4 x USB 3.2 Gen 1, 6 x USB 2.0
bios: 256 Mb Flash ROM, UEFI AMI BIOS
description: MSI Z790 motherboard supports Intel 12th/13th Gen Core i9/i7/i5/i3 processors. Perfect for gamers and PC builders seeking performance and connectivity.
